# FIX-003: Backend Typecheck Failure on Threshold Upsert and Dashboard Category Query

- Date: 2026-04-14
- Issue: N/A (adhoc local typecheck failure)
- Agent: backend
- Verified: Yes

---

## Solusi (Solution)

Merapikan dua titik error TypeScript backend:

1. Threshold upsert menambahkan `createdById` pada payload create.
2. Query spending per kategori dashboard diganti ke pendekatan yang sesuai tipe generated Prisma.

## Perubahan yang Dilakukan (Changes Made)

| File                                                     | Perubahan                                                                                                          |
| -------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| apps/backend/src/modules/assets/asset.controller.ts      | Tambah `@CurrentUser('id') userId` pada endpoint update threshold dan forward ke service                           |
| apps/backend/src/modules/assets/asset.service.ts         | Ubah signature `updateStockThreshold(modelId, minQuantity, userId)` dan tambahkan `createdById` pada create upsert |
| apps/backend/src/modules/dashboards/dashboard.service.ts | Hapus include relasi pembelian yang tidak valid, ganti dengan mapping `modelId` ke `categoryId` via query `asset`  |

## Verifikasi

- [x] Fix tested locally
- [x] No regression introduced
- [x] Related checks pass

## Hasil Check

- Backend typecheck: passed
- Frontend lint: passed
- Frontend typecheck: passed
- Backend lint: passed
